'''Gnarhk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] servant of the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] [[Antonin]]. In [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]], [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] slit his neck in order to get to Antonin.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Gnarkh's name is also spelled Gnarhk.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Jango Fett (one-shot)|''Star Wars: Jango Fett'']] {{1st}}
